.. py:data:: TargetLike

.. py:function:: cached(func = None, out_idx = None, *args, target = None, target_host = None, execution_backend = None, verbose = None, pass_configs = None, compile_flags = None)

   Caches and reuses compiled kernels (using KernelCache class).
